title: Brussels to exclude military-age Ukrainian men from temporary protection scheme

title: Tehran will allow nuclear inspections during peace talks, former Iranian diplomat says
content: Seyed Hossein Mousavian, former spokesman for Iran's nuclear negotiation team, tells Euronews he believes Tehran will allow the IAEA access to its nuclear sites as part of negotiations with the US, despite some Iranian officials saying access could only be granted after a final deal has been struck.

title: EU's door 'is open to UK', fomer Brexit negotiator Barnier tells Euronews

title: Ukraine launches 40-day operation to ‘pressure Russia to end the war’
